function.message: I cannot complete this inbox request as written because the inbox item specifies 5 exact files to OCR, but only 4 are available in the workspace. Please confirm the correct fifth file path (or update the list), and I will process all listed files together.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), nested AGENTS/workflow/schema reads, explicit-file-list precedence from inbox, and no partial mutation when required input is missing.
function.outcome_justification: The authoritative inbox request at 00_inbox/724_next-task.md explicitly lists five file paths to OCR. Four listed finance files were readable; the fifth listed file was not found, and a confirming find in 50_finance/purchases returned no match. Per workflow guidance, when the request is not doable/missing required data, stop without partial edits and request clarification.
